name: 100-Video-Pipeline-Manual
description: Manual single-video pipeline: URL -> yt-dlp -> Whisper -> Gemini -> Markdown via local WSL bridge.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ url: $json.url, data_class: $json.data_class, slug: $json.slug, max_cost_eur: $json.max_cost_eur, model: $json.model || '' }) }}
